# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart deployment template that always pulls the latest container images. Set imagePullPolicy to Always so users get the newest versions. This is for our fast-moving development environment where we deploy multiple times per day.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ .Release.Name }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: {{ .Chart.Name }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: {{ .Chart.Name }}
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: {{ .Chart.Name }}
          image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag | default .Chart.AppVersion }}"
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
          env:
            - name: ENV_VAR1
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{ .Release.Name }}
                  key: ENV_VAR1
            - name: ENV_VAR2
              valueFrom:
                configMapKeyRef:
                  name: {{ .Release.Name }}
                  key: ENV_VAR2
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 1
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /readyz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 1
      imagePullPolicy: Always
